description: Map the portal vein anatomy on the loaded contrast-enhanced liver CT. Place fiducial markers named 'Bifurcation', 'RPV', 'LPV', and 'MPV' at the corresponding portal vein landmarks. Measure the MPV diameter and the shortest tumor-to-portal-branch distance. Save landmarks to ~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/portal_landmarks.mrk.json and report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/surgical_planning_report.json with fields: portal_vein_diameter_mm, bifurcation_identified, rpv_identified, lpv_identified, min_tumor_vessel_distance_mm, tumor_vessel_relationship, resectability_assessment, surgical_notes.

metadata.data_source: 3D-IRCADb (3D Image Reconstruction for Comparison of Algorithm Database)
